Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.cmmn.behavior

Class CallingTaskActivityBehavior

java.lang.Object
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.cmmn.behavior.PlanItemDefinitionActivityBehavior
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.cmmn.behavior.StageOrTaskActivityBehavior
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.cmmn.behavior.TaskActivityBehavior
org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.engine.impl.cmmn.behavior.CallingTaskActivityBehavior
All Implemented Interfaces:
CmmnActivityBehavior, CoreActivityBehavior<CmmnActivityExecution>
Direct Known Subclasses:
DecisionTaskActivityBehavior, ProcessOrCaseTaskActivityBehavior
public abstract class CallingTaskActivityBehavior extends TaskActivityBehavior
Author:
Roman Smirnov
